description:
Configure REST API access for a headless mobile app integration. Create a new Application Password named 'MobileApp_iOS' for the admin user and save the credentials in the format 'admin:PASSWORD' to /home/ga/mobile_api_credentials.txt. Additionally, create a private post titled 'App Configuration Endpoint' containing the following JSON data:

{
  "app_version": "2.4.1",
  "maintenance_mode": false,
  "features": ["push_notifications", "dark_mode", "offline_sync"],
  "api_base": "https://api.nimbustech.com/v2"
}
